Headline/Hook Text: RIP Excel / RIP Canva / Stop creating, start resurrecting. Your content graveyard is a goldmine.
Visual Formula: Emotional mourning pose beside a symbolic gravestone; target tool name on stone; giant bold title at the bottom
Target Outcome: Highlighting industry disruption and resurrecting past winning content
Color/Design Guidance: Simple scene; focus on the gravestone and high-contrast bold white text at the bottom
Inferred Success Factor (Inferred): Uses a familiar meme format to signal high-stakes change and leverages the "Recycle Your Winners" principle to reduce reach risk.

Headline/Hook Text: BREAKING: AI just replaced your content team
Visual Formula: Subject in front of relevant backdrop; red or purple "BREAKING" label at top; giant white stacked text; news studio energy
Color/Design Guidance: Use red or purple for the breaking tag; key phrases in purple, yellow, or green to pop against dark lower half
Inferred Success Factor (Inferred): Urgency and authority cues (breaking news banners) trigger a biological "alert" response, increasing stop-rates.

Headline/Hook Text: Crack the Facebook algorithm / Claude can now launch your business
Visual Formula: One clear face with strong expression (close/medium crop); huge stacked headline filling most of image; dark gradient behind text
Color/Design Guidance: Yellow for outcomes, green for money, purple for AI tools; highlight only key words; mobile-first bottom-heavy layout
Inferred Success Factor (Inferred): Human faces create biological trust while giant mobile-optimized text ensures readability in fast-scrolling feeds.

Headline/Hook Text: I stopped listening to 'gurus' and did this instead. Here are the actual numbers.
Visual Formula: Split layout: top half shows luxury/lifestyle scene (e.g., rooftop pool); bottom half shows bank/Stripe transaction history
Color/Design Guidance: Red circle around the specific deposit amount; high contrast between white text and dark background
Inferred Success Factor (Inferred): Combines aspirational lifestyle imagery with concrete financial "proof" to capture attention and build immediate credibility.

Headline/Hook Text: 99% of people missed this / Stop doing common tactic
Visual Formula: Confused or frustrated entrepreneur face; huge white text; neon green or yellow highlights on result words
Color/Design Guidance: High contrast; use red for warnings; white main text; darkened lower half to make text pop
Inferred Success Factor (Inferred): Leverages FOMO (Fear Of Missing Out) and the "Negativity Bias" to make users stop and verify if they are making a mistake.

Headline/Hook Text: "The Anti-Robot Ai Playbook!" Build an Ai Team That Sounds Like You and Sells For You!
Visual Formula: High-fashion press scrum photograph, surrounded tightly by cameras and microphones
Target Outcome: Conversion and brand loyalty through authenticity
Inferred Success Factor (Inferred): Counter-intuitive positioning (Anti-Robot) creates curiosity while promising AI efficiency without the loss of "human" touch.

Headline/Hook Text: I made a Vibe Coding app... With unlimited usage for $9 a month! DM "Vibe" for access
Visual Formula: Live comparison or demo of the app interface
Inferred Success Factor (Inferred): Calls out current tech trends ("Vibe coding") and offers an immediate, low-friction solution to a high-interest topic.

Headline/Hook Text: I'm Using groups as a Signal Generator to force the Facebook algorithm to prioritize your profile in the feed.
Visual Formula: Analytics pipeline view or screenshot of group growth
Inferred Success Factor (Inferred): Appeals to users' desire to "beat the system" by explaining the mechanics of behavioral reaction density.

Headline/Hook Text: I just built a tool that creates 100 Authority Building Headshot Style Images! Want to see it?
Visual Formula: Before and after carousel of AI-generated headshots
Target Outcome: Social proof and demand for tool access
Color/Design Guidance: Realistic headshot styles with "Spotlight Studio" branding
Inferred Success Factor (Inferred): Provides immediate visual proof of an AI's capability to solve a personal branding pain point (professional photography).

Headline/Hook Text: Most engagement comes from unfinished posts. The brain hates open loops, so it comments to close them.
Visual Formula: Short, punchy text with "colored background" or minimal design
Target Outcome: High comment volume to boost algorithmic reach
Inferred Success Factor (Inferred): Exploits the Zeigarnik effect (brain's need for closure), forcing the audience to engage to seek the answer.

Headline/Hook Text: Be a creator and you won’t have to worry about jobs
Visual Formula: Speaker portrait; minimal clutter; one powerful large quote in white; cinematic background
Color/Design Guidance: Minimalist design; one strong emphasis color on a specific word in the quote
Inferred Success Factor (Inferred): Personal branding and quotes humanize the expert, creating social proof and shareability through shared values.

Headline/Hook Text: AI twin can make you $5K while you sleep
Visual Formula: Before/after split or problem/solution split; promise headline; one side shows problem, other shows improved outcome
Color/Design Guidance: Highlighted financial outcome in yellow or green; direct CTA subline; simple and instantly understandable
Inferred Success Factor (Inferred): Visual proof of transformation provides immediate evidence of the hook's claim, reducing skepticism.

Headline/Hook Text: Everyone is panicking about Facebook’s new “two-link rule.” But here’s the truth most people are missing...
Inferred Success Factor (Inferred): Uses a "Newsbreak" style hook to capitalize on platform-wide anxiety, positioning the creator as an authority.
